rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban in any curriculum or training surface.
Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Rule 2(b) re-amended 2026-05-09 (second pass): bare MN allowed at M2 or later in the training's arc. This is the M2 exercise file — bare M1 in body line 79 PASSES as curriculum-wide convention.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prior 'tomorrow' time-of-day hit at line 83 is no longer in the body — hand-fixed to 'next plan-mode pass'.
